name: scenario3_multi_interviewer_observers
description: A panel interview: two interviewers who both ask questions, one real candidate, and two silent observers (a note-taker and someone on a phone). The verdict must separate the candidate from multiple interviewers AND from silent observers at the same time.

events.text: Hi Neha, thanks for joining. Can you introduce yourself?
Hi, my name is Neha Gupta and I'm a frontend developer.
Great. Could you tell me about a project you're proud of?
Sure, I led the redesign of our checkout flow and improved conversion.
I also mentored two junior engineers during that project.
